content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Egear : Senior Google Ads Media Buyer / Performance Marketing Lead Anywhere in the World Florida Google Analytics, Paid Social Media Advertising, and Google Ads All Other Remote Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Florida, USA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://egearmedia.com/">https://egearmedia.com/</a> </p> <p>We are looking for someone with experience level: 4–7 years running Google Ads independently, ideally in a performance marketing agency or ecommerce media buying team. Not a generalist digital marketer - a specialist who lives in Google Ads daily. Someone who can take full ownership of our paid search and Performance Max campaigns, bring structure to our account operations, and drive our media buying to consistent profitability.<br><br>Who we are:<br>A fast-growing e-commerce performance marketing agency running direct-to-consumer offers across multiple product verticals including smart devices, health, and outdoor products.<br><br>What you will own<br><br>You will be the most senior hands-on media buyer on the team. This is not a management role where you direct others — you will be in the accounts every day. Specifically you will:<br><br>- Plan, build, and optimise Google Search, Performance Max, Demand Gen, and Display campaigns across multiple product offers and accounts<br>- Set up and maintain full tracking and attribution in RedTrack, including postback URLs, offer parameters, sub-parameter mapping, and conversion event configuration<br>- Diagnose and resolve account-level issues including conversion tracking failures, advertiser verification, billing problems, and campaign ID mismatches<br>- Evaluate each offer independently and give a clear verdict: scale, test a new angle, or cut losses<br>- Brief landing page requirements to our web developer based on performance data, not guesswork<br>- Deliver a written performance report every week covering spend, ROAS, CPA by campaign etc.<br>- Establish and document campaign setup standards so the rest of the team can follow a consistent process<br>- Mentor junior media buyers on campaign architecture and optimisation<br><br>What we offer:<br><br>Fully remote, flexible hours — we care about results not schedules<br>Direct access to decision-makers — no layers of approval<br>Performance bonus structure based on ROAS targets (discussed at offer stage)<br>A team that is already generating real data and real results — you will not be starting from zero<br><br>To apply<br>Send your application to&nbsp;<a class="external_link" href="mailto:anna@egearmedia.com">anna@egearmedia.com</a>&nbsp;with the subject line: Google Ads Media Buyer<br>Your application must include:<br><br>1. CV with projects cases<br>2. A link to a short video introduction (google drive/ Frame/ social media or on any other platform) also covering description of a Google Ads campaign you took from unprofitable to profitable — what was broken, what you changed, and what the result was.<br>Your experience with third-party tracking tools and how you have used them<br>Your availability and rate expectations.<br><br>Applications without video presentation will not be reviewed.<br>Thank you!</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/egear-senior-google-ads-media-buyer-performance-marketing-lead">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/egear-senior-google-ads-media-buyer-performance-marketing-lead</a></p> Sun, 26 Apr 2026 12:50:19 +0000 Tue, 26 May 2026 12:50:19 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/egear-senior-google-ads-media-buyer-performance-marketing-lead https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/egear-senior-google-ads-media-buyer-performance-marketing-lead Affirm: Senior Product Manager, Digital Wallets & Agentic Commerce Anywhere in the World Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote US </p> <div class="job__description body"><div><p>Affirm is reinventing credit to make it more honest and friendly, giving consumers the flexibility to buy now and pay later without any hidden fees or compounding interest.</p></div><div><p>The Digital Wallets &amp; Agentic Commerce team is advancing this mission by partnering with industry leaders to build the BNPL infrastructure that will define commerce over the next decade. We’ll help customers discover, choose, and pay using Affirm inside Wallets such as Apple Pay and Google Pay as well as within future agentic experiences.&nbsp;</p><br><p>We’re hiring a Senior Product Manager to own high-impact product areas across our portfolio of Wallet, PSP, merchant, and agent integrations. This person will be a hands-on product leader who designs delightful experiences, partners with external platforms and merchants, and ships end-to-end. This is a role for someone who can move quickly from insight to experiment to measurable impact while thinking deeply about product design, engineering, and long-term platform strategy.</p><br><p>This is not just an optimization role; it’s a mix of 0→1 and 1→N work. You’ll ship novel experiences that demonstrate what next generation commerce can be and then scale the highest-impact ideas across partners and channels.</p><br><p><strong>What you’ll do</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><br><p>Translate Affirm’s mission into a clear product roadmap for a wallet/agentic product area</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Ship experiments, many of which are in ambiguous areas (agentic checkout, BNPL in physical stores, etc.), and scale winners</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Partner with Engineering, Analytics, Design, Risk, Legal, and merchant/platform partners</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Define and own KPIs (GMV, approval rate, conversion, LTV, customer trust metrics)<br>&nbsp;</p><br></li><br></ul><br><p><strong>What we look for</strong></p><br><ul><br><li><br><p>4+ years PM experience shipping consumer/mobile/commerce products</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Hands-on with payments, wallets (Apple/Google Pay), or merchant/platform integrations</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>0-&gt;1 Builder Mentality: You aren’t just an optimizer; you have a history of launching new products or features from scratch that fundamentally changed user behavior&nbsp;</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Technical &amp; Design Fluency: You can speak the language of engineering (API constraints, latency) and have an incredibly high bar for UI/UX design. You know what "butter smooth" feels like and won't settle for clunky interactions</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Commercially minded with a high-agency, bias-to-action mindset and comfort making hard tradeoffs in ambiguous environments</p><br></li><br><li><br><p>Strong quantitative and analytical orientation—comfortable using data to drive decisions, and translating complexity into clear narratives</p><br></li><br><li>Bache
